## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing behavior changes)
- [ ] CLI integration (new vendor support)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore (no user-facing change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/autmzr/cmd/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I added/updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] I updated docs (`README.md` / `docs/`) if behavior changed
- [ ] No bulk reformatting of files I didn't touch
- [ ] I'm not committing secrets, large binaries, or unrelated lockfile changes
